sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1324" key="a)dia/skeuos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀδιά-σκευος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1324.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unequipt</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἵππος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> </cit> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
